Plaintiff/ Respondent Bingyi Wang'S Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Carla Contreras, Court Reporter: Carol Haraburda CSR #8052 (dept. 12)

Appearances,
Resposdent, Bingyi Wang, is not present.
Attorney, Anne Hipshman, from the State of California, is appearing on behalf of the Respondent.

No appearance by counsel or defendant.

This cause came on calendar this day for Respondent's Motion to Vacate and Set Aside the Default Judgment. No opposition made. The Court, having reviwed the papers submitted, the Court GRANTS the motion and set aside the default judgment. Order submitted and signed by the Court.
